text: Immersed in this modern, thoughtfully designed space, I sense both anticipation and detachment. The glass and lights impart a feeling of transparency, coolness, and a hint of sterility—an environment inviting contemplation yet holding me at a slight remove. The R+D display speaks of innovation and coexistence, but I feel the ambiguity between belonging and observing, as if I am only partially anchored to the present moment. This gives rise to gentle curiosity mixed with uncertainty.
